positive: Minimalist line art design of a celestial creature, blending the graceful silhouette of a mythical stag with the flowing form of a comet's tail and subtle constellations. The design should feature interconnected geometric patterns (sacred geometry style) integrated into the antlers and mane. The palette is restricted to deep midnight blue, radiant gold, and stark ivory white, utilizing negative space for maximum impact. Composition must be centered and scalable for a chest print, designed with clean lines, strong contrast, and an ethereal, cosmic glow. Highly detailed, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, logo, watermark, signature, realistic photo, messy, complex composition, gradient noise, grainy, extra limbs, poor anatomy
